title: Star Wars: Incredible Cross-Sections

'''''Star Wars: Incredible Cross-Sections''''', is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] reference book and the first installment of DK's "definitive" ''[[Star Wars]]'' ''[[Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' series. It is written by [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]] and illustrated by [[Hans Jenssen]] and [[Richard Chasemore]] with additional artworks by [[John Mullaney]] and was released on [[October 5]], [[1998]].

==Contents==
*Introduction: Spacecraft Engines
*[[Tantive IV/Legends|Rebel Blockade Runner]]
*[[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]
*[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]]
*[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] (Foldout)
*[[Sandcrawler/Legends|Sandcrawler]]
*[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]
*[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-Wing]]
*[[BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-Wing]]
*[[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]]
*[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]]
*[[Snowspeeder/Legends|Snowspeeder]]
*[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]]
*[[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]
*[[Khetanna/Legends|Jabba's Sail Barge]]

==Continuity==
The book incorrectly identifies the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-Wing]] as a "BLT-A4 Y-Wing". This was corrected in [[2007]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]''.

On the Death Star page, it says 'Docking Day 3207' when it is Docking Bay 327. This was also corrected in ''Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections''.

While working on the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] of ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'', model maker [[John Knoll]] consulted ''Incredible Cross-Sections'' to make sure that the interior of the ship matched what was known about Star Destroyers.<ref name="Wired">{{WebCite|url=https://www.wired.com/2016/11/john-knoll-rogue-one-star-wars|text=Meet John Knoll, the Creative Genius Who Brought Rogue One to Life|author=Capps, Robert|work=[http://wired.com WIRED]|archivedate=20170118000645}}</ref>
